sentence: 他每天早上都会看报章。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang dōu huì kàn bào zhāng.
english: He reads the newspapers every morning.

sentence: 他把钱投入了一支私募基金。
pinyin: Tā bǎ qián tóurù le yī zhī sī mù jījīn.
english: He put his money into a private placement fund.

meaning: the surface of a wall (esp. an interior wall)
sentence: 他们把墙面刷成了浅蓝色。
pinyin: Tāmen bǎ qiáng miàn shuā chéng le qiǎn lán sè.
english: They painted the wall surface light blue.

sentence: 这个项目覆盖了整个县域。
pinyin: Zhège xiàngmù fùgài le zhěnggè xiàn yù.
english: This project covers the entire county area.

meaning: stock market index; share price index; abbr. for 股票指數|股票指数[gu3 piao4 z
sentence: 今天股指上涨了两个百分点。
pinyin: Jīntiān gǔ zhǐ shàngzhǎng le liǎng gè bǎifēndiǎn.
english: Today the stock market index rose by two percentage points.
